ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "zip_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the zip file containing all project resources */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project and its functionality */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* File path to the documentation associated with the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the project */,
  "technology_stack" TEXT /* Information about the technology stack used in the project */,
  "complexity_level" TEXT /* Level of complexity of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project to which the file belongs */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the source file */,
  "is_main" INTEGER /* Indicates if this file contains the main method */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the source file in bytes */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension of the source file */,
  "file_content" TEXT /* Actual content of the source file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project to which the resource belongs */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource */,
  "resource_path" TEXT /* File path to the resource */,
  "resource_size" INTEGER /* Size of the resource file in bytes */,
  "resource_extension" TEXT /* File extension of the resource file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what this category entails */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "category_icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_categories" (
  "proj_cat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-category association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if this category is the primary category for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proj_cat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_categories_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the project was accessed */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser or device used to access the project */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who provided the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or feedback provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "dependency_name" TEXT /* Name of the dependency */,
  "dependency_version" TEXT /* Version of the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
